title: calycobolus insignis
intro: Calycobolus insignis is a plant species commonly known as the 'false thyme' or ' false thyme vine', belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Calycobolus insignis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in traditional medicine, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine and natural remedy practices.
